heading: Use for reclamation purposes of certain lands within exterior boundary
label: 406d–5 Use for reclamation purposes of certain lands within exterior boundary
text: Nothing in this Act shall affect the use for reclamation purposes, in accordance with the Act of (), and Acts amendatory thereof or supplementary thereto, of the lands within the exterior boundary of the park as prescribed by this Act which have been withdrawn or acquired for reclamation purposes or the operation, maintenance, rehabilitation, and improvement of the reservoir and other reclamation facilities located on such withdrawn or acquired lands.June 17, 190232 Stat. 388
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , which enacted this section, sections 406d–1 to 406d–4, 431a, 451a, 482m, 673b, and 673c of this title, and provisions set out as notes under . Section 1 of the Act was partially repealed and restated as sections 104907 and 320301(d) of Title 54, National Park Service and Related Programs, by , §§ 3, 7, , , 3272. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.act Sept. 14, 1950, ch. 95064 Stat. 849section 406d–1 of this titlePub.
